subcodes.first_line: The Book of God hath been sent down in truth from the kingdom of His sacred, mighty and praiseworthy utterance. Verily hath the horizon of Manifestation been illumined by its Speaker [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الله نزل بالحق من ملکوت بیانه المقدس العزیز الحمید قد انار افق الظهور بمکلم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @praise and encouragement
